title: leighia
intro: Leighia is a genus of flowering plants in the daisy family, characterized by its showy, daisy-like flowers and medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of the Leighia plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leighia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Leighia is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used topically as a compress or ointment to soothe sore muscles and skin irritations.
